seller.verificationBody: Verified sellers receive a green checkmark badge on their profile and listings. Uploaded documents are stored privately in Supabase Storage.
seller.getVerifiedBody: Upload a government ID, proof of business ownership, and optionally a business license. Once submitted, your profile moves to pending review in the admin panel.
seller.submitSuccess: Documents uploaded. Your verification request is now pending review.

admin.title: Verification and listing moderation
admin.subtitle: Review pending seller verification requests, open private verification documents, and moderate seller listings from a single dashboard.

whatYoullGet.title: Partner Network
whatYoullGet.description: Direct access to vetted brokers, attorneys, distributors, and marketing specialists.

faq.a: We send access links within 48 hours of signup. Early signups get priority onboarding and exclusive first-partner sessions.
BridgeEast is completely free. Our partners pay to be featured, so you always have access to the full platform at no cost.

faq.q: Can I share my access with my team?
faq.a: Yes! Once you join, you can add team members and collaborators. We recommend including your co-founders and key advisors.

faq.q: Do I have to be opening soon?
faq.a: No. Whether you're in the planning phase or launching within 6 months, BridgeEast has resources for you. We serve founders at every stage.

faq.q: What if my cuisine type isn't covered?
faq.a: Our guides and data focus on food & beverage in general, with specific depth on Asian cuisines. If you need specialized guidance, our partner network can help.
